sql-injection.name: SQL Injection
sql-injection.description: User-controlled input is used to construct SQL queries without proper sanitization.

command-injection.name: Command Injection
command-injection.description: User input is used to construct system commands executed by the operating system.

ldap-injection.name: LDAP Injection
ldap-injection.description: Unsanitized input is used to build LDAP queries.

xss.name: Cross-Site Scripting
xss.description: Untrusted input is rendered in web pages allowing execution of malicious scripts.

path-traversal.name: Path Traversal
path-traversal.description: User-controlled input allows access to files outside the intended directory.

insecure-deserialization.name: Insecure Deserialization
insecure-deserialization.owasp: A08:2021 Software and Data Integrity Failures
insecure-deserialization.description: Deserializing untrusted data may allow remote code execution.

hardcoded-secret.name: Hardcoded Secret
hardcoded-secret.description: Sensitive credentials such as passwords or API keys are embedded directly in code.

weak-crypto.name: Weak Cryptography
weak-crypto.description: Weak or outdated cryptographic algorithms are used.

insufficient-randomness.name: Insufficient Randomness
insufficient-randomness.description: Predictable random values are used for security-sensitive operations.

open-redirect.name: Open Redirect
open-redirect.description: Application redirects users to untrusted external URLs.

ssrf.name: Server-Side Request Forgery
ssrf.description: Server-side requests can be manipulated to access internal resources.

improper-authentication.name: Improper Authentication
improper-authentication.description: Authentication mechanisms fail to correctly verify user identity.

csrf.name: Cross-Site Request Forgery
csrf.description: Unauthorized commands are transmitted from a user that the application trusts.

insecure-file-upload.name: Insecure File Upload
insecure-file-upload.description: Application allows uploading of files that may execute malicious code.

xml-external-entity.name: XML External Entity
xml-external-entity.description: XML parsers allow external entity expansion leading to data exfiltration.

unsafe-eval.name: Unsafe Dynamic Evaluation
unsafe-eval.description: Dynamic code execution using untrusted input.

debug-enabled.name: Debug Mode Enabled
debug-enabled.description: Application runs with debugging features enabled in production.
